query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `flow_nodes` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`flowId` int NOT NULL,
	`nodeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`label` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`subtitle` varchar(255) DEFAULT '',
	`x` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`y` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`bgColor` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#091c34',
	`textColor` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#378add',
	`config` json,
	CONSTRAINT `flow_nodes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user kar6ha6JbcE4aYg.root --database U99xhnpstbGe6JQ9Zeas4L --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `flow_nodes` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`flowId` int NOT NULL,
	`nodeId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`label` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`subtitle` varchar(255) DEFAULT '',
	`x` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`y` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`bgColor` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#091c34',
	`textColor` varchar(32) DEFAULT '#378add',
	`config` json,
	CONSTRAINT `flow_nodes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
